rationale: The previous attempt's `assert forall` blocks had auto-chosen triggers limited to `proc_dom().contains(p_ptr)`, which Verus flagged as low-confidence and which prevented the two runs' per-process ensures from being instantiated together. This repair lifts each ensures forall with an explicit per-run `#![trigger post{1,2}_self_.get_proc(...)]` (mirroring the ensures' own trigger choice) and uses an explicit dual-trigger `#![trigger post1_self_.get_proc(p_ptr), post2_self_.get_proc(p_ptr)]` on the bridge `assert forall` so the cross-run children / uppertree_seq / subtree_set equalities are pinned for z3.
